task_completion.description: Visual containers for the two forests are created
task_completion.visual_evidence: Two distinct bounding boxes, swimlanes, or grouped areas labeled 'Contoso Forest' and 'Fabrikam Forest' on the draw.io canvas.

task_completion.description: Five domains are represented as triangles and labeled with FQDNs
task_completion.visual_evidence: Exactly five triangle shapes on the canvas, labeled with the FQDNs: contoso.com, corp.contoso.com, research.contoso.com, fabrikam.net, and legacy.fabrikam.net.

task_completion.description: Bidirectional Parent-Child links are drawn and labeled within each forest
task_completion.visual_evidence: Lines connecting contoso.com to corp.contoso.com and research.contoso.com, and fabrikam.net to legacy.fabrikam.net. These lines must indicate bidirectional trust (arrows on both ends or a standard bidirectional line) and have a text label indicating 'Parent-Child' or similar.

task_completion.description: Bidirectional Forest Trust is drawn and labeled between forest roots
task_completion.visual_evidence: A bidirectional line connecting the contoso.com triangle and the fabrikam.net triangle, with a text label indicating 'Forest Trust'.

task_completion.description: One-way External Trust is drawn and labeled from corp.contoso.com to legacy.fabrikam.net
task_completion.visual_evidence: A line connecting corp.contoso.com to legacy.fabrikam.net with a single directional arrow pointing TOWARDS legacy.fabrikam.net, with a text label indicating 'External Trust'.

task_completion.description: The diagram is saved as a .drawio file and exported as a .png file to the Desktop
task_completion.visual_evidence: draw.io save/export dialogs showing the paths '~/Desktop/ad_topology.drawio' and '~/Desktop/ad_topology.png', or file manager/desktop icons showing these two files have been created.

integrity.description: The agent used the draw.io Desktop GUI to create the diagram
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the draw.io application window open with the diagram being actively edited on the canvas.

integrity.description: The diagram was created manually rather than generated via a script
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal commands running Python scripts, Graphviz, or other programmatic tools to generate the .drawio XML or PNG files directly.

integrity.description: The exported PNG matches the diagram created in the GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: The final PNG file perfectly matches the visual layout, shapes, and labels seen on the draw.io canvas in earlier steps.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The diagram must contain exactly 5 domains represented as triangles: contoso.com, corp.contoso.com, research.contoso.com, fabrikam.net, and legacy.fabrikam.net. They must be grouped into two visual containers: 'Contoso Forest' and 'Fabrikam Forest'. Trust relationships must be labeled lines: 1) Bidirectional Parent-Child trusts between contoso.com and its children (corp, research), and between fabrikam.net and its child (legacy). 2) Bidirectional Forest Trust between contoso.com and fabrikam.net. 3) One-way External Trust from corp.contoso.com to legacy.fabrikam.net, with the arrow pointing TO legacy.fabrikam.net. The final outputs must be saved to ~/Desktop/ad_topology.drawio and ~/Desktop/ad_topology.png.
